headline: Brajan Gruda
body: 🚨💥 EXCL | Brajan Gruda to RB Leipzig - DONE DEAL ✔️ Full agreement reached with Brighton. Loan with an obligation to buy agreed. Total package worth between €25m and €30m. Only final details and paperwork remain. Gruda is set to become Micho Demichelis’ first signing. philipphinze24 🇩🇪
raw_text:
🚨💥 EXCL | Brajan Gruda to RB Leipzig - DONE DEAL ✔️

Full agreement reached with Brighton. Loan with an obligation to buy agreed. Total package worth between €25m and €30m.

Only final details and paperwork remain. Gruda is set to become Micho Demichelis’ first signing. @philipphinze24 🇩🇪
text:
